# Credit card negative corpus — these should NOT trigger the detector
# Phone numbers, order numbers, dates, serial numbers, random digit sequences
Phone: +1 800 555 1234
Order number: 1234567890123456 (fails Luhn)
Order ref: ORD-1234567890
Tracking: 1234567890123 (too short / no valid BIN)
Invoice INV-20240101-001
Document ID: 9876543210987654 (starts with 9, blocked)
Latitude 40.7128 Longitude -74.0060
Employee ID: 1234567890
ZIP code: 90210
Date of birth: 01/15/1985
Social security ends in 1234
License plate: ABC 1234
Item barcode: 1234567890128
Loyalty card: 1111111111111111 (all ones, Luhn fails)
Reference code: 9999999999999999 (Luhn fails)
Passport number A12345678
Serial number SN-1234567890
Driver license DL98765432
Membership ID MBR-1234-5678
Year 2024 month 01 day 15
Invoice 20240115001234
Model number XP-4111111111111
Part number 5500-005-555-555 (fails Luhn)
Room number 4111 floor 11
